title: Fast Fiction Factory Review Home Map and Meters

shelf_cards.label: Review Home / Brief
shelf_cards.purpose: Show the current read path, shelf map, and user-side next action before opening detailed evidence.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user is starting review or has lost orientation.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The user is already ready to judge the bridge package.

shelf_cards.label: Draft-to-Video Bridge
shelf_cards.purpose: Review the selected 3-minute mystery-lore production hypothesis before generation.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user needs to accept, revise, or reject route, narration, text, visuals, thumbnail, risks, or held truths.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The user only needs source-span or artifact audit.
shelf_cards.next_action: Return freeform review on the bridge.

shelf_cards.label: Draft Review Pack
shelf_cards.purpose: Inspect the one-story draft materials that feed the bridge.
shelf_cards.open_when: The bridge feels wrong and the user wants the underlying beats, text cues, visuals, or risk cards.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The bridge is enough to judge the production hypothesis.

shelf_cards.label: Designer Dashboard
shelf_cards.purpose: Explain why this candidate and channel route were selected.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user wants to replace the candidate or channel route.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The selected route is acceptable for bridge review.
shelf_cards.next_action: Record a replacement reason or keep the selected route.

shelf_cards.label: Source Audit
shelf_cards.purpose: Audit extraction evidence and source-span validity.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user needs to inspect source refs, source spans, routing, or extraction safety.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The user is judging creative direction only.
shelf_cards.next_action: Flag only the suspicious span or route.

shelf_cards.label: Project Cockpit
shelf_cards.purpose: Inspect history, boundaries, and locked gates.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user needs to verify what is authorized, blocked, or still human-owned.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The user is only reviewing bridge quality.
shelf_cards.next_action: Return to development if a boundary appears open.

shelf_cards.label: Artifacts
shelf_cards.purpose: Inspect files, docs, JSON readbacks, and validation logs.
shelf_cards.open_when: The user needs file or validation proof.
shelf_cards.do_not_open_when: The user is doing normal freeform bridge review.
shelf_cards.next_action: Name the missing artifact or failing validation only.

meter_semantics.measured: Use only local counts, static readback flags, preserved result JSON, and locked gate counts.
meter_semantics.hypothesis: Use only UX clarity or user-burden judgments; never imply production readiness.

validation_notes: Review Home Map is preserved through the Home Cockpit command surface; mode=home is a compatibility alias to brief.
Evidence Vault shelves are summarized, not removed.
Measured meters are backed by local counts and readbacks; hypothesis meters are only UX clarity signals.
No provider/API, AI video, render, upload, final canon, or rights clearance boundary is opened.
